create-property-model.description: Create Django Property model with PostGIS
create-property-model.prompt: Create Property model with all fields including PostGIS location, features JSON, and media JSON

create-property-card.prompt: Create PropertyCard component with TypeScript, following design system (colors, spacing, shadows)

implement-whatsapp-webhook.prompt: Create webhook handler for WhatsApp Business API with signature validation and lead creation

optimize-3g-loading.prompt: Apply 3G optimization techniques: code splitting, lazy loading, progressive images, skeleton loading

setup-docker-compose.prompt: Create docker-compose.yml with PostgreSQL+PostGIS, Redis, RabbitMQ, Django, Next.js, Nginx

create-avm-model.prompt: Implement Hybrid AVM model with hedonic regression + KNN comparables + confidence scoring

audit-security.prompt: Check endpoint for vulnerabilities: SQL injection, XSS, CSRF, rate limiting, input validation

create-tests.prompt: Create unit, integration, and E2E tests for the property creation flow
